entries.name: Gnostic Traditions
entries.definition: Gnostic Traditions provides comprehensive wisdom for governance through authentic spiritual principles and practical magical knowledge.
roles: Uses Gnostic Traditions principles for empowerment
contributions: Gnostic Traditions teaches authentic self-expression in leadership
Wisdom governance balances authority with compassion
True power serves the highest good of all beings

attributes.governor_essence: A Gnostic Traditions Governor embodies the synthesis of spiritual wisdom and practical leadership, guided by gnostic traditions principles.
